verification_instructions: Run npm run build and confirm it exits with code 0
environment_constraints: OPEN_INTERNET - full network access. Node.js v22 available via nvm.
contribution_requirements: No CONTRIBUTING.md. Standard Next.js project conventions.
key_patterns: - App Router: pages in app/ directory as page.tsx files. - 'use client' directive for client components. - Tailwind CSS for styling (tailwind.config.ts). - @/* path alias maps to project root. - Existing layout.tsx wraps all pages with RoleProvider and Navbar. - The new dashboard page should be created as a new route (e.g., app/promo-dashboard/page.tsx) to avoid breaking the existing page.tsx.
directory_structure: app/ - Next.js app router pages and API routes. components/ - Shared React components. data/ - JSON data files. scripts/ - Python utility scripts.
